## What

One-sentence summary of the change.

## Why

Motivation. Link to any issue / ADR.

## Layer impact

- [ ] no layer change
- [ ] promotes an artifact (links to ADR)
- [ ] demotes an artifact (links to ADR)
- [ ] new artifact (status: ACTIVE_NOW | OPTIONAL_LATER | SCALE_STAGE | EXPERIMENTAL)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm doctor` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] If a `packages/*` public surface changed → `pnpm changeset` added
- [ ] STACK.md updated if tech matrix changed
- [ ] No `.env*` files committed
